parameters.content:
## Sprint Retrospective Analyser

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set RETRO_EMAIL_TO
3. Trigger manually after each sprint or connect to your retro board tool via webhook
4. LLM clusters items into went-well / improve / action themes
5. Approval gate before results go to the team

parameters.jsCode:
const items = [
  { id: 'r001', category: 'went_well', text: 'Pair programming sessions improved code quality significantly' },
  { id: 'r002', category: 'went_well', text: 'Daily standups were short and focused — under 15 minutes every day' },
  { id: 'r003', category: 'went_well', text: 'We shipped the onboarding flow on time and under budget' },
  { id: 'r004', category: 'went_well', text: 'Design reviews were earlier in the sprint — fewer last-minute changes' },
  { id: 'r005', category: 'went_well', text: 'Team communication in Slack channels improved vs last sprint' },
  { id: 'r006', category: 'to_improve', text: 'Ticket estimates were consistently off — most took 2x longer than planned' },
  { id: 'r007', category: 'to_improve', text: 'Too many context switches — engineers were pulled into meetings mid-task' },
  { id: 'r008', category: 'to_improve', text: 'QA was bottlenecked in the last 2 days of the sprint' },
  { id: 'r009', category: 'to_improve', text: 'Unclear acceptance criteria on 4 of 12 tickets caused rework' },
  { id: 'r010', category: 'to_improve', text: 'We had no buffer for unexpected bugs from production' },
  { id: 'r011', category: 'action', text: 'Add 10% buffer to all estimates next sprint' },
  { id: 'r012', category: 'action', text: 'PM to write acceptance criteria before sprint planning — not during' },
  { id: 'r013', category: 'action', text: 'Block 2 hours per engineer per day as focus time (no meetings)' },
  { id: 'r014', category: 'action', text: 'QA to start testing on day 5, not day 8 of a 10-day sprint' }
];
return [{ json: { items, sprint: 'Sprint 23', team: 'Product Engineering', total: items.length } }];

const { analysis: a, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const report = [
  `SPRINT RETROSPECTIVE — ${m.sprint} | ${m.team}`,
  `Items analysed: ${m.total} | Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  `Team health signal: ${a.team_health_signal?.toUpperCase()} — ${a.team_health_rationale}`,
  ``,
  `WENT WELL (themes):`,
  (a.went_well_themes||[]).map(t => `  ✓ ${t.theme} (${t.items_count} items)\n    Insight: ${t.key_insight}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `TO IMPROVE (themes):`,
  (a.improvement_themes||[]).map(t => `  ✗ ${t.theme} (${t.items_count} items)${t.recurring?' [RECURRING]':''}\n    Root cause: ${t.root_cause}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `PRIORITISED ACTIONS FOR NEXT SPRINT:`,
  (a.prioritised_actions||[]).map(ac => `  → ${ac.action}\n    Owner: ${ac.owner} | By: ${ac.by_when} | Addresses: ${ac.addresses_theme}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `PATTERNS TO WATCH:`,
  (a.patterns_to_watch||[]).map(p => `  - ${p}`).join('\n'),
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: {{ $json.meta.sprint }} Retrospective Analysis
parameters.message:
=
{{ $json.report_text }}

Approve and share with team | Reject
